instruction: Recolor ONLY the icon between light-bulb and lock-closed (the key) red (#e63946). Every other icon stays #222.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 272 80" width="272" height="80">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="272" height="80" fill="white" />
  <g id="fire" data-source="heroicons/outline/fire.svg" transform="translate(16, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15.362 5.214A8.252 8.252 0 0 1 12 21 8.25 8.25 0 0 1 6.038 7.047 8.287 8.287 0 0 0 9 9.601a8.983 8.983 0 0 1 3.361-6.867 8.21 8.21 0 0 0 3 2.48Z"/>
  <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 18a3.75 3.75 0 0 0 .495-7.468 5.99 5.99 0 0 0-1.925 3.547 5.975 5.975 0 0 1-2.133-1.001A3.75 3.75 0 0 0 12 18Z"/></g>
  <g id="light-bulb" data-source="heroicons/outline/light-bulb.svg" transform="translate(80, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 18v-5.25m0 0a6.01 6.01 0 0 0 1.5-.189m-1.5.189a6.01 6.01 0 0 1-1.5-.189m3.75 7.478a12.06 12.06 0 0 1-4.5 0m3.75 2.383a14.406 14.406 0 0 1-3 0M14.25 18v-.192c0-.983.658-1.823 1.508-2.316a7.5 7.5 0 1 0-7.517 0c.85.493 1.509 1.333 1.509 2.316V18"/></g>
  <g id="key" data-source="heroicons/outline/key.svg" transform="translate(144, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15.75 5.25a3 3 0 0 1 3 3m3 0a6 6 0 0 1-7.029 5.912c-.563-.097-1.159.026-1.563.43L10.5 17.25H8.25v2.25H6v2.25H2.25v-2.818c0-.597.237-1.17.659-1.591l6.499-6.499c.404-.404.527-1 .43-1.563A6 6 0 1 1 21.75 8.25Z"/></g>
  <g id="lock-closed" data-source="heroicons/outline/lock-closed.svg" transform="translate(208, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M16.5 10.5V6.75a4.5 4.5 0 1 0-9 0v3.75m-.75 11.25h10.5a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25-2.25v-6.75a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25H6.75a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25 2.25v6.75a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
